headline: Pakistan Launches Crypto Unit Amid $1BIllicit Flow Crackdown

article.title: Pakistan steps up crypto enforcement with dedicated federal unit
article.summary: A senior official with Pakistan’s Federal Investigation Agency reportedly recommended other agencies establish similar units to address crypto-related crime.

headline: Telegram Launches Native Gram Crypto Wallet This Week

article.title: Pavel Durov says Telegram to roll out native Gram crypto wallet
article.summary: Telegram founder Pavel Durov said the messaging platform will roll out a native non-custodial Gram wallet this summer, bringing self-custody crypto transactions to its more than 1 billion users.

headline: Semiconductors Surge 3% as Stocks Rebound Sharply

article.title: Stocks Climb as Rebound in Chipmakers Gathers Pace: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Wall Street staged a comeback as dip buyers emerged, lifting stocks amid a rally in chipmakers on bets the artificial-intelligence trade that’s powered the bull market has more room to run.

headline: US Yields Surge to 2-Month High on Oil Spike

article.title: US Yields Hit Two-Month High as Oil Sparks Inflation Risk
article.summary: US Treasuries fell, pushing 10- and 30-year yields to the highest in about two months, as a surge in oil prices stoked concern that inflationary pressures will prompt the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates.

headline: Gemini Losses Mount: $1B Pro Delay Hits Google

article.summary: As Gemini 3.5 Pro stalls in testing limbo, Google ships 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and a restricted cybersecurity model—and quietly teases Gemini 4.

article.summary: The Tiger Global-led round values the startup at $1 billion as it wires stablecoin rails directly into a federally chartered bank, aiming to modernize the correspondent-banking plumbing behind cross-border payments.

headline: Satsuma Scraps Bitcoin Holdings, Delists in London

article.title: Satsuma shareholders approve bitcoin treasury liquidation and London delisting
article.summary: The vote comes less than a year after UK-based Satsuma Technology raised $218 million to pursue its bitcoin strategy.

headline: $300M Sports Betting Market Faces Regulatory Scrutiny

article.summary: As state and federal regulators continue to clash over who should oversee sports-related prediction markets, lawmakers consider stepping in.
